description: Public browser-exposed tools for learning about Guillaume Gustin and preparing contact messages. This site does not expose a remote MCP server endpoint.

transports.description: Load the homepage and inspect navigator.modelContext tool registrations.

tools.name: get_profile_summary
tools.description: Return a concise Markdown profile summary for Guillaume Gustin.

tools.name: prepare_contact_message
tools.description: Prepare a contact message payload for the public contact form.
